title: A Button where i can decide if i want to go over the 10.000 Limit

posts.author: DastinTot (Dastin Tot)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have a button in the admin tab where i can decide to go over the maximum of 10.000 Elements/Linked Elements.
Or a upgrade to atleast 20.000 Elements.
I work a lot with Monday and i almost come with every Board to the 10.000 Linked Elements mark.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DastinTot - Have you considered upgrading to the Enterprise plan? That will give you up to 20,000 items per board, 200 columns, 60 linked boards and dashboards and tons of security and permission features. If you would like to learn more about Enterprise, you can book a time to chat with us at the link below.
